summary: Iteration 277 - RDive-36 Recursive Dive Page Testing. ALL CORE FEATURES WORKING: Page renders at /recursive-dive, 9×9 lattice grid with 81 cells displays correctly, cell selection with highlight works, double-tap DIVE triggers Zoom-Snatch animation (L0→L1→L2 tested), Surface button returns to previous depth, haptic frequency changes per depth (60Hz→51Hz→42Hz), Mint Seed button works and stores seeds, 36-bit address updates in DepthHUD, Back navigation visible. KNOWN ISSUE: React infinite loop error ('Maximum update depth exceeded') continues from previous iterations - does not break functionality but impacts performance.

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error repeatedly - inherited from previous iterations
integration_issues.details: This error indicates a useEffect dependency issue causing infinite re-renders. Does not break functionality but impacts performance. Likely in useSentientRegistry.js or useZeroPointFlicker.js

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix React infinite loop - likely in useSentientRegistry.js or useZeroPointFlicker.js useEffect dependencies
critical_code_review_comments: RecursiveDivePage.js: Well-structured page component with proper state management for seeds and info panels
RecursiveLattice.js: Complex but well-organized component with proper memoization (React.memo), ghost layers, zoom animations
useRDive36.js: Comprehensive hook with 36-bit address encoding/decoding, haptic frequency scaling, crystalline seed minting
Added data-testid attributes to Surface button, Mint Seed button, lattice cells, and container for better testability

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All RDive-36 features working, only React infinite loop warning

context_for_next_testing_agent: RDive-36 page is fully functional. All features tested and working: 9×9 grid (81 cells), cell selection, double-tap dive (L0→L1→L2), Surface button, Mint Seed, haptic frequency scaling (60→51→42Hz), 36-bit address display, ghost layers. Added data-testid attributes: rdive-cell-{row}-{col}, rdive-surface-button, rdive-mint-seed-button, rdive-lattice-container. React infinite loop warning persists from previous iterations.

page_renders_at_recursive_dive.details: Page renders with title 'RECURSIVE DIVE' and subtitle '36-BIT COORDINATE NAVIGATOR'

9x9_lattice_grid.details: 81 cells found with hexagram symbols and language indicators

cell_selection.details: Click on cell highlights it with glow effect, shows 'Double-tap to DIVE' instruction

double_tap_dive_L0_to_L1.details: Double-click triggers Zoom-Snatch animation, depth changes to L1, DEPTH 1 label visible

double_tap_dive_L1_to_L2.details: Second dive works, L2 indicator visible, DEPTH 2 label visible, 6,561 states shown

surface_button.details: Surface button returns to previous depth level (L1→L0 tested)

ghost_layer.details: Ghost layer containers found (6 elements with pointer-events-none)

mint_seed_button.details: Mint Seed button visible at depth > 0, clicking increments Seeds count

36_bit_address_display.details: Binary address with | separators displayed in DepthHUD

console_errors.impact: Performance degradation but does not break functionality
console_errors.likely_cause: useEffect dependency issue in useSentientRegistry.js or useZeroPointFlicker.js - inherited from previous iterations

data_testid_added: rdive-mint-seed-button - Mint Seed button in DepthHUD
